name: Loki
description: Log aggregation backend. Receives workload logs from the platform via gRPC and stores them in Grafana Loki.
longDescription:
Deploys a gRPC wrapper alongside a Loki container. The platform forwards workload log entries via IngestLog gRPC calls; the wrapper writes them to Loki using the Loki push API.

Exposes a LogQL-compatible query endpoint at http://loki:3100 for Grafana and other visualizers.
author: Kleff

config.label: Loki URL
config.description: Override to use an external Loki instance. Leave blank to use the bundled companion.
